sentences.arabic: اجْتَمَعَ الْفَرِيقُ لِيُقَسِّمَ الْمَهَامَّ بَيْنَ الْأَعْضَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Tim se okupio da podijeli zadatke između članova.
sentences.translationEn: The team met to divide tasks among the members.

sentences.arabic: أَخَذَ كُلُّ شَخْصٍ الْمَهْمَّةَ الَّتِي يُتْقِنُهَا.
sentences.translation: Svaka osoba preuzela je zadatak u kojem je vješta.
sentences.translationEn: Each person took the task they are skilled at.

sentences.arabic: عَمِلُوا بِتَنَاسُقٍ وَأَنْجَزُوا الْعَمَلَ قَبْلَ الْمَوْعِدِ.
sentences.translation: Radili su usklađeno i završili posao prije roka.
sentences.translationEn: They worked in harmony and completed the work before the deadline.

sentences.arabic: مَدَحَهُمُ الْمُدِيرُ عَلَى الْعَمَلِ الْجَمَاعِيِّ الْمُمَيَّزِ.
sentences.translation: Direktor ih je pohvalio za izvanredan timski rad.
sentences.translationEn: The manager praised them for the excellent teamwork.
